title: Instances
deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this instance?
name: Name
apiKeyHint: Optional. Fill in the remote instance's API key to enable passwordless access. Without it, you'll need to log in with username and password after switching.

apiKeyInvalid.title: API Key Validation Failed
apiKeyInvalid.description: This API key was rejected by the remote instance. You can delete the key to use password login instead, or enter the correct key.

switch.title: Switching Instance
switch.apiKeyRejected: API key rejected by remote instance. Please switch back to local, then remove the key to use password login or enter the correct key.
switch.unreachable: Cannot reach the remote instance. Please check the address.

remoteHint: You are connected to a remote instance. To add, edit, or delete instances, switch back to the local instance first.
noInstancesHint: Add a remote NeoMind backend to monitor and manage it from here

validation.urlInvalid: URL must start with http:// or https://
